## Surface
Which bounded surface is affected?

## Expected behavior
What should happen?

## Actual behavior
What happened instead?

## Boundary impact
Does this issue risk role drift, false authority, false truth, or execution overreach?

## Reproduction
Exact command, fixture, or test path.
